testcases.input: n = 2, start = 3 Output: [3,2,0,1] Explanation: The binary representation of the permutation is (11,10,00,01). All the adjacent element differ by one bit. Another valid permutation is [3,1,0,2]
testcases.expectedOutput: [3,2,0,1] Explanation: The binary representation of the permutation is (11,10,00,01). All the adjacent element differ by one bit. Another valid permutation is [3,1,0,2]
